## What happened?

- [ ] The app rejected the item text.
- [ ] The app accepted the item but chose the wrong slot family.
- [ ] The app equipped the item but replacement/offhand behavior looked wrong.
- [ ] Other:

Example: Weapon 1, Weapon 2, Ring 1, Amulet, Helmet.

## Notes

Please remove account names, private character names, and full local filesystem paths before posting. Keep the item text formatting exact if the issue depends on copied trade-site text.
